home.seo_desc: 2c2t.dev is an open-tech project collective dedicated to infrastructure and self-hosting.
home.subtitle2: Open-tech projects dedicated to infrastructure, network deployment, and self-hosting.
home.projects_desc: Solutions designed to streamline and accelerate system installations.
home.community_desc: 2c2t.dev is first and foremost a place for exchange and experimentation.
home.discord_desc: Join a community of enthusiasts. Discuss infrastructure, share your experiments, and help evolve our tools.
home.github_desc: All our tools are open. Check the code, propose improvements, or learn from our technical architecture directly on our repositories.

projects.seo_desc: Discover our open-tech solutions like GetISO and NetISO.
projects.title: Our Projects
projects.desc: The 2c2t tool suite for infrastructure and system deployment.

project_getiso.desc: Optimized platform for downloading system images.

project_netiso.desc: Network boot (PXE / iPXE) to install operating systems directly via the network.

project_bootiso.desc: Software utility interconnected with GetISO automating secure download and USB flashing.

about.seo_desc: Discover the technical DNA, mission, and values of the 2c2t.dev open-tech collective.
about.title: About 2c2t
about.desc: The technical DNA and vision behind the collective.
about.mission_desc: We are a group of sysadmins, developers, and cybersecurity enthusiasts. Our goal is to simplify and modernize bare-metal infrastructure by creating fast, reliable, and accessible open-source tools.
about.val_open_desc: Knowledge sharing is at the core of our approach.
about.val_perf_desc: Tools designed to be fast and resource-efficient.
about.val_exp_desc: We test, break, and rebuild to learn.

team.seo_desc: Meet the enthusiasts and technical experts behind the 2c2t.dev project.
team.title: The Team
team.desc: The passionate people behind the 2c2t.dev project.

contact.seo_desc: Discuss infrastructure projects with us or join our open community.
contact.title: Contact
contact.desc: We are always open to discussions, project ideas, and contributions.
contact.info_location_desc: Collective operating mainly from the Paris region and the south of France.
contact.info_contrib_desc: Our projects are open. Feel free to submit PRs or discuss ideas on Discord.
